title: Aviation Safety Draft Documents Open for Comment
description: Aviation Safety Draft Documents Open for Comment
text:
We invite you to comment on Aviation Safety Aircraft Certification Service and Flight Standards Service draft guidance and publication documents posted on this website. We will provide the following draft documents when available for comments. We will review all comments received and consider them for incorporation in the final document.
Aircraft Certification Service (AIR) Draft Documents
Document Type No. Open Last Updated Advisory Circulars (ACs)
1
January 7, 2026

None

None

January 12, 2026
Technical Standard Orders (TSOs)
None
Note: Most Flight Standards sections, below, have a subscription feature. If available, please subscribe to the specific Flight Standards page to receive notification of Flight Standards updates.
